report.summary: Audited two new tokenized stocks pages for UX issues, created OG images (SVG+PNG) for both, and implemented accessibility/navigation refinements across the learn guide and tracker tool.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Breadcrumb navigation to /learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026 (Home > Learn > Tokenized Stocks Guide 2026)
Added Breadcrumb navigation to /tools/tokenized-stocks-tracker (Home > Tools > Tokenized Stocks Tracker)
Added BackToTop button to both pages for long-scroll usability
Fixed search input accessibility: replaced outline:none with visible focus ring (2px solid #6366f1) on tracker page
Added aria-label to search input for screen reader support
Added keyboard accessibility to sortable table headers: tabIndex, onKeyDown (Enter/Space), aria-sort attribute
Added focus ring styles to filter buttons (All/Stocks/ETFs/Index) with ring-offset for dark theme
Improved empty state: added SearchX icon, friendly message, and 'Clear filters' CTA button
Added scroll-into-view behavior when expanding asset detail panel so it doesn't get lost below the fold
Added ref-based smooth scrolling to detail panel on asset selection

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: tokenized-stocks-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with stats cards, stock tickers, gradient brand bar
OG image: tokenized-stocks-tracker (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with mini data table, market cap chart, protocol breakdown

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026/page.tsx — added Breadcrumb, BackToTop imports and rendering
src/app/tools/tokenized-stocks-tracker/page.tsx — added Breadcrumb, BackToTop, accessibility fixes, empty state improvement, scroll-into-view
public/og-tokenized-stocks-guide.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
public/og-tokenized-stocks-tracker.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
